news.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump’s ‘big beautiful bill’
news.summary: If oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law, analysts say. Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices are elevated for a long time, consumers could lose as many as $1,000 per year.

news.title: Iran war: Hegseth says Tuesday 'will be our most intense day of strikes'

news.title: Spirit Airlines to recall furloughed pilots to combat attrition as carrier eyes bankruptcy exit
news.summary: Spirit Airlines is reversing course on pilot furloughs after aviators left in high numbers for rival airlines. Spirit Airlines is reversing course on Pilot Furlough's after Aviators Left in High Numbers for Rivals.

news.title: Federal appeals court orders end to SAVE plan used by millions of student loan borrowers
news.summary: A federal appeals court ordered the end to the SAVE plan, the Biden-administration era program used by millions of student loan borrowers.

news.title: How the Iran war and rising energy prices are threatening semiconductor demand
news.summary: A prolonged U.S.-Israel war against Iran could lead to shortages of key chipmaking materials and higher energy costs which could hurt semiconductor demand.

news.title: Return to the 2022 stock-market playbook as Iran conflict drags on, say these strategists
news.summary: Barclays says the chasm between winning and losing stocks in 2022 when Russia invaded Ukraine was huge. Here are their style picks.

news.title: 5 tips for travelers during the most chaotic spring break in years
news.summary: Americans who thought spring break would offer rest and relaxation after a tough winter may be in for a rude awakening. The U.S. has had a rough winter.

news.title: Medicare Advantage is facing a reality check — and seniors are the ones who will pay for it
news.summary: Medicare Advantage is getting squeezed. Once lucrative for insurers and a safe haven for patients, Medicare Advantage is now getting squeezed by insurers and patients.

news.title: How I got $1,000 back by complaining like a pro
news.summary: Investing during times of geopolitical uncertainty. Exploring the conventional wisdom around how to invest during these times of uncertainty. Plus: Exploring some of the most popular investment ideas of recent years.

news.title: The Iran conflict marks the biggest oil disruption in history, with no capacity cushion
news.summary: Rapidan Energy Group says the 20% disruption from “Gulf War III’ is more than double the prior record set in 1956-57.
